response.title: Chief Technology Officer
response.description: As the Chief Technology Officer (CTO) at Innovative Tech Solutions, you will lead our technology strategy, manage the engineering team, oversee product development, and drive innovation across the organization. You will be responsible for aligning technology initiatives with business goals to ensure sustainable growth and competitive advantage in the market. Your extensive experience in technology leadership will guide our efforts in developing cutting-edge solutions that meet the needs of our clients.

requirements.education: Master's Degree in Computer Science or related field
